label: Infrastructure Connectivity
info:
Connectivity tests for core infrastructure components.

- Kafka: consumes raw-transactions topic (broker at kafka:9092)
- PostgreSQL TXN: transaction_processor DB (postgres/postgres@txn-db:5432)
- PostgreSQL JWT: jwt_service DB (jwt_service/jwt_service003@jwt-db:5432)

Click inject buttons to verify connections and see live counts.

label: JWT Auth API
info: JWT-based authentication API for login, registration, and token verification. Proxies to the jwt-service at port 3000.

label: Transaction API Prototype
info: Prototype REST API for transactions and accounts backed by PostgreSQL. Endpoints: /health, /api/stats, /api/transactions, /api/transactions/:id, /api/accounts, /api/accounts/:accountId. Authenticated via JWT.

label: Transacto
info:
Birds-eye view dashboard for the complete microservices system.

Services:
- User Service (3100) - user CRUD operations
- JWT Auth (3000) - authentication and token management
- Transaction API (4000) - account and transaction queries
- Kafka (9092) - event streaming (raw-transactions topic)
- PostgreSQL - jwt_service and transaction_processor databases

Inject buttons: Health checks for each service + Check All.
Link nodes: quick navigation to each flow tab.

name: TXN table counts
query: SELECT table_name, (xpath('/row/c/text()', query_to_xml(format('SELECT count(*) AS c FROM %I', table_name), false, true, '')))[1]::text::int AS count FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'public'

name: JWT table counts
query: SELECT table_name, (xpath('/row/c/text()', query_to_xml(format('SELECT count(*) AS c FROM %I', table_name), false, true, '')))[1]::text::int AS count FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'public'

name: Format result
Format result
Query stats
query: SELECT json_build_object('total_events', (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM processed_events), 'total_accounts', (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM accounts), 'volume_by_currency', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(json_build_object('currency', currency, 'tx_count', tx_count, 'total_volume', total_volume)), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT raw_event->'payload'->>'currency' AS currency, COUNT(*)::int AS tx_count, SUM((raw_event->'payload'->>'amount')::numeric)::text AS total_volume FROM processed_events GROUP BY raw_event->'payload'->>'currency') sub)) AS result

name: Query transactions
query: SELECT event_id, transaction_id, raw_event->>'eventType' AS event_type, raw_event->>'timestamp' AS event_timestamp, raw_event->'payload'->>'transactionId' AS transaction_id_inner, raw_event->'payload'->>'sourceAccountId' AS source_account_id, raw_event->'payload'->>'destinationAccountId' AS destination_account_id, (raw_event->'payload'->>'amount')::numeric AS amount, raw_event->'payload'->>'currency' AS currency, raw_event->'payload'->>'description' AS description, raw_event, processed_at FROM processed_events ORDER BY processed_at DESC LIMIT 50

name: Query by id
query: SELECT event_id, transaction_id, raw_event->>'eventType' AS event_type, raw_event->>'timestamp' AS event_timestamp, raw_event->'payload'->>'transactionId' AS transaction_id_inner, raw_event->'payload'->>'sourceAccountId' AS source_account_id, raw_event->'payload'->>'destinationAccountId' AS destination_account_id, (raw_event->'payload'->>'amount')::numeric AS amount, raw_event->'payload'->>'currency' AS currency, raw_event->'payload'->>'description' AS description, raw_event, processed_at FROM processed_events WHERE event_id = $1 OR transaction_id = $1

name: Query accounts
query: SELECT account_id, balance, currency, updated_at FROM accounts ORDER BY account_id LIMIT 50

name: Query by accountId
query: SELECT account_id, balance, currency, updated_at FROM accounts WHERE account_id = $1

label: User Service
info:
Manual test client for user-service.

First click 'Login' to authenticate, then use other buttons.
Create user first to get a user ID, then get/change/delete by that ID.

Docker host: http://user-service:3100
